queries.question: For each research institute, what are the respective names of their projects?
queries.sql: select research_institutes.name , projects.name from Research_Institutes_Projects join Projects on Research_Institutes_Projects.ProjectID = Projects.ProjectID join Research_Institutes on Research_Institutes_Projects.InstituteID = Research_Institutes.InstituteID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/healthcare/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?research_institutes_projects a :Research_Institutes_Projects .
  ?projects a :Projects .
  ?research_institutes_projects p:hasProjects ?projects .
  ?research_institutes a :Research_Institutes .
  ?research_institutes_projects p:hasResearch_Institutes ?research_institutes .
  ?research_institutes p:name ?name .
  ?projects p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: which project name is shared by all research institutes?
queries.sql: SELECT Projects.Name  from Research_Institutes_Projects join Projects on Research_Institutes_Projects.ProjectID = Projects.ProjectID join Research_Institutes on Research_Institutes_Projects.InstituteID = Research_Institutes.InstituteID   GROUP BY Research_Institutes_Projects.ProjectID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Research_Institutes_Projects.InstituteID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Research_Institutes)

ambiguous_dsl.question: What project names are associated with each research institute?
